title: Who Am I?
content:
Hello! I'm Nazmi Yücel Çan. I created this personal website to share my projects, publications, and experiences in the fields of data science, machine learning, and deep learning. My goal is to showcase my work, present complex topics in an understandable language, and connect with other professionals in the industry.

I am constantly improving myself in the field of data science, especially in neural networks, natural language processing, and data analysis. In my spare time, I enjoy trying out new algorithms, contributing to open-source projects, and researching the ethical dimensions of artificial intelligence.
